theorem procedural_associator_cocycle_2f8bbcac3cf0 : True →
  ((∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocRing R] (x y z : Rᵐᵒᵖ),
      associator x y z = -MulOpposite.op (associator (MulOpposite.unop z) (MulOpposite.unop y) (MulOpposite.unop x))) →
    (∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocRing R] (a b c d : R),
      a * associator b c d - associator (a * b) c d + associator a (b * c) d - associator a b (c * d) +
          associator a b c * d =
        0)) := by
  sorry

theorem procedural_isRegular_iff_eq_zero_of_mul_650cc665dd8b : (True →
    (∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocRing R] {r : R},
      IsRegular r ↔ (∀ (x : R), r * x = 0 → x = 0) ∧ ∀ (x : R), x * r = 0 → x = 0)) ∧
  (∀ {M : Type _} [Monoid M] [HasDistribNeg M] {a b : M}, Associated a (-b) ↔ Associated a b) := by
  sorry

theorem procedural_IsSumSq_sum_52fc2ded72fb : ((∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalRing R] [IsAddTorsionFree R] {p q : R} (hp : IsIdempotentElem p) (hq : IsIdempotentElem q),
      IsIdempotentElem (q - p) ↔ p * q = p ∧ q * p = p) →
    (∀ {R : Type _} [AddCommMonoid R] [Mul R] {ι : Type _} {I : Finset ι} {s : ι → R} (hs : ∀ i ∈ I, IsSumSq (s i)),
      IsSumSq (∑ i ∈ I, s i))) ∧
  (∀ {α : Type _} {s : Finset α} {p q : α → Prop} [DecidablePred p] [DecidablePred q],
    Disjoint (Finset.filter p s) (Finset.filter q s) ↔ ∀ x ∈ s, p x → ¬q x) := by
  sorry
tasks.title: Procedural IsSumSq.sum

((∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalRing R] [IsAddTorsionFree R] {p q : R} (hp : IsIdempotentElem p) (hq : IsIdempotentElem q),
      IsIdempotentElem (q - p) ↔ p * q = p ∧ q * p = p) →
    (∀ {R : Type _} [AddCommMonoid R] [Mul R] {ι : Type _} {I : Finset ι} {s : ι → R} (hs : ∀ i ∈ I, IsSumSq (s i)),
      IsSumSq (∑ i ∈ I, s i))) ∧
  (∀ {α : Type _} {s : Finset α} {p q : α → Prop} [DecidablePred p] [DecidablePred q],
    Disjoint (Finset.filter p s) (Finset.filter q s) ↔ ∀ x ∈ s, p x → ¬q x)
